name: Tripleseat Event Management API
what_it_does: Tripleseat REST API for event venue management, catering sales, and private dining booking for hospitality businesses. Enables AI agents to manage event lead capture and booking inquiry workflow for venue sales automation, handle event contract generation and digital signature for private event booking, access banquet event order (BEO) management for catering operations coordination, retrieve food and beverage menu management for catering menu automation, manage venue availability and room booking calendar for event space management, handle event payment and deposit collection for catering revenue management, access customer and contact management for hospitality CRM, retrieve reporting and analytics for venue sales performance, manage event document and proposal generation for hospitality sales workflow, and integrate Tripleseat event data with POS, accounting, and hospitality management platforms.
use_cases: Capturing event leads from venue sales agents
Generating event proposals from catering agents
Managing BEOs from event operations agents
Tracking venue sales from hospitality analytics agents
not_for: Public ticketed events without private dining/catering focus
Hotels without food and beverage event management
best_when: A restaurant group, hotel, or event venue using Tripleseat wants AI agents to automate event lead management, proposal generation, BEO creation, and catering sales workflow.
avoid_when: PAYMENT HANDLING RISK: Tripleseat collects event deposits and payments — automated payment collection without proper PCI-DSS controls creates cardholder data security risk. Liquor liability — automated event booking for private events with alcohol service must verify venue licensing and guest intoxication policies; automated booking of events with open bars creates liquor liability exposure. Allergen and dietary restriction management — catering automation must accurately track and communicate guest food allergies; automated BEO errors involving allergens create food safety liability.

auth.notes: Tripleseat uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Developer documentation at tripleseat.com/api. Concord, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2008 by Jonathan Morse. Private (Bessemer Venture Partners, Level Equity). 15,000+ restaurant, hotel, and venue customers. Private dining and catering sales focus. Competes with Gather, Planning Pod, and Caterease for event venue management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; enterprise restaurant group pricing
pricing.notes: Concord, MA. Founded 2008. Bessemer/Level Equity-backed. 15,000+ venue customers. Private dining and catering focus. Competes with Gather and Caterease for event management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PAYMENT RISK: Tripleseat automated event deposit collection requires PCI-DSS compliance in payment handling; cardholder data must not be stored in logs or agent memory

Allergen tracking accuracy — automated BEO generation must accurately propagate guest dietary restrictions and food allergies from booking to kitchen; allergen errors create food safety liability and potential ADA accommodation issues

Liquor liability — automated private event booking with open bar service must validate venue liquor license and state dram shop liability; automated booking without license validation creates liquor liability exposure
API key scope — Tripleseat API key provides broad venue access; multi-location restaurant groups should use location-scoped API keys to prevent cross-location data access
Contract and digital signature — automated event contract generation and e-signature must comply with ESIGN Act requirements; ensure e-signature workflow captures proper consent
BEO timing — automated BEO distribution to kitchen must account for food preparation lead times; last-minute BEO changes must trigger re-notification workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Event venue and catering. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key auth. US. Event booking and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hospitality event management. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key. US. Event booking and payment data.
